completed_phases.name: Transaction cost fix (0.3% → 0.6% TWSE / 0.7% TPEx)
completed_phases.summary: Replaced flat 0.3% commission with market-specific round-trip costs. TWSE 0.6%, TPEx 0.7%. Added _is_tpex() and _get_transaction_cost() helpers. Updated all 3 P&L paths. Verified via Z.ai review.

completed_phases.name: Data quality threshold fix (50-day → 240-day min for 300-day SMA)
completed_phases.summary: Changed data quality gate from 50-day to 240-day minimum (one full trading year). Below 240 days = low confidence, 240-270 = medium, 270+ = high. Fixed variable naming (min_days_50 → max_history_days).

completed_phases.name: Corporate action backward-adjustment engine
completed_phases.summary: Full backward-adjustment engine. 401 stocks with corporate action data. Adjustment formula: (close - cash_div) / (1 + stock_div/100). All historical OHLCV adjusted backward from ex-date. Downstream modules (regime_detector, stage1_screen) now use adj_close. Price history lookback increased to 365 days. ROC date conversion helpers.

completed_phases.name: Tiered regime system (NORMAL→CAUTION→STRESS→CRISIS→BLACK_SWAN)
completed_phases.summary: Replaced 3-regime system with 5-tier system. BLACK_SWAN bypasses 5-day freeze for emergency exits. Position sizing: normal=1.0x, caution=0.6x, stress=0.3x, crisis=0.1x, black_swan=0.0x. Updated regime_rules.json, telegram_alerts.py emoji mapping. Config version bumped to 4.0.

completed_phases.name: Survivorship bias Tier 1 (12% return haircut)
completed_phases.summary: Added 12% return haircut and 8% win rate haircut to backtest results to account for delisted stocks not in dataset. Reports both raw and adjusted metrics (avg_pnl_pct_adj, win_rate_adj). Tier 2 (scrape delisted stocks) pending.

completed_phases.name: Sector refinement (12-15 sub-sectors + correlation matrix)
completed_phases.summary: Split 'technology' (9 industry codes) into 6 sub-sectors: semiconductor, electronics, optoelectronics, communications, computers, components. Added correlation matrix and sector concentration checks. Max 25% per sector.

completed_phases.name: Conditional weight smoothing (avoid flash-trade triggers)
completed_phases.summary: Added weight smoothing to limit per-day weight changes to 5%. Saves previous day's weights and interpolates on regime transitions. Updated weights.json to v4.0 with new regime names.

completed_phases.name: Regime freeze exemption for volatility shocks
completed_phases.summary: Already implemented in Phase 3. BLACK_SWAN regime bypasses 5-day min duration, allowing immediate emergency exits during extreme volatility events.

completed_phases.name: Integration testing
completed_phases.summary: Final validation step for Phases 0-7.

completed_phases.name: Survivorship Bias Tier 2: Holiday calendar, Pydantic schema enforcement
completed_phases.summary: Full holiday calendar with cross-year loading, half-day sessions, make-up workdays. Pydantic schemas for all data types with extra='forbid' on internal schemas. Validation at ingestion boundary reduced errors from 44.5% → 0.2%. Fixed critical batch_validate() bug (normalize_keys broke aliases) and RevenueRecord schema mismatch.

completed_phases.name: Holiday-aware position sizing + post-holiday volatility spike detection
completed_phases.summary: Added HolidayCalendar integration to PaperTrader with graceful fallback. _is_post_holiday() detects first trading day after extended gaps (>3 calendar days). _get_holiday_risk_factor() reduces position size by 25-50% for upcoming long holiday gaps. ATR stop widening (+30%) on post-holiday days to avoid premature stop-outs during volatility spikes. Fixed critical weekend gap bug (threshold > 3 instead of > 0) and holiday_calendar.py NameError.

completed_phases.name: Inter-stage Pydantic validation + robust candidate handoff
issues_addressed: Added validate_stage1_candidates() — strict Pydantic validation between Stage 1 and Stage 2
Score breakdown defaults (25) removed — missing data must fail, not be scored as mediocre
Silent composite_score default (.get(..., 0)) fixed — now skips safely instead of masking bugs
Defensive field access in run_stage2() loop
fixes_applied: Score defaults: sb.get('revenue', 25) → sb['revenue'] (direct key access)
Verified code vs stock_id field name — no mismatch in practice
completed_phases.status: completed - R1 applied, Z.ai response truncated but critical items addressed

completed_phases.name: Stage 2 error handling + scoring diagnostics
completed_phases.summary: Replaced all 6 bare except: clauses in stage2_deep.py with structured error handling. Added scoring diagnostics (error counts per check, score distribution stats). Z.ai R2 fixes: return values → None instead of defaults to avoid fake signal bug, logging level changed .warning() → .debug() for scale, inner except narrowing added AttributeError alongside ValueError.

completed_phases.name: Corporate action backfill (2020-2025) + volume adjustment
completed_phases.summary: Fixed volume adjustment gap: stage1_screen and regime_detector now use adj_volume instead of raw volume for all calculations. Added yfinance-based backfill script (scripts/backfill_corporate_actions.py) that pulls 2020-2025 corporate actions from Yahoo Finance, since TWSE TWT49U API returns HTML. Backfilled data cached to data/twt49u_ex_dividend.json with 15 major stocks and 127 total actions.

completed_phases.name: Ex-date validation + alert holiday suppression
completed_phases.summary: Added validate_ex_dates() to corporate_actions.py with Taiwan-aware duplicate detection (date+cash_div+stock_div tuple key). Holiday suppression in telegram_alerts.py for daily alerts, critical/heartbeat bypass. Fixed 7 Z.ai R1 bugs: import paths (3 files), false-positive duplicate detection, type mismatch in is_trading_day(), inverted severity logic, missing return statement, pseudo-code syntax error.

completed_phases.name: Holiday-aware backtest exits + typhoon/stale-data edge cases
completed_phases.summary: Refactored _calc_holding_days() to use holiday_calendar.count_trading_days_in_range(). Updated exit loop in run_backtest() for explicit trading-day counting. Added is_trading_day() checks for typhoon/stale-data handling. Workflow shift to Z.ai agent mode (Z.ai codes, I review).

completed_phases.name: Critical bug fixes — market cap, regime signature, backtest ATR stops, post-holiday gap, deps
completed_phases.summary: Z.ai agent mode completed all 5 fixes. #5 market cap: close × (paid_in/10) using Taiwan face value NT$10/share, pledge ratio also fixed. #4 regime signature: added detect_regime_from_prices() entry point to regime_detector.py. #8 backtest stops: rewrote with ATR-based logic (2.5×ATR + 0.5×gap buffer), removed random noise simulation. #1 post-holiday off-by-one: proper calendar-day gap calc, threshold adjusted >= 4. #20 deps: added pydantic + yfinance to requirements.txt.

completed_phases.name: Remaining bug fixes — RSI Wilder smoothing, import paths, config mismatches
completed_phases.summary: Z.ai agent mode completed all 6 fixes. #9 RSI: Wilder's exponential smoothing (14-period). #2 pd import: moved to module level in fetch_institutional.py. #3 import paths: normalized to bare module names across core/. #6 ADV threshold: default matches thresholds.json (NT$50M). #14 regime weights: uses tiered regime names from config. #16 stage2 weights: loaded from config with fallback defaults.

completed_phases.name: Performance & architecture — O(n²) scan fix, pipeline runner
completed_phases.summary: Z.ai agent mode completed both fixes. #10 O(n²) scan fix: built index dicts once in stage2_deep.py, all 5 check functions use O(1) lookups instead of linear scans (~30,000 iterations saved per run). Backward compatible with optional index params. #11 Pipeline runner: new run_pipeline.py orchestrates full pipeline (fetch→history→regime→stage1→stage2→paper_trader→telegram_alerts) with timing, error handling, state.json updates.

completed_phases.name: Remaining Z.ai findings — weight smoothing (#13), Telegram alerts fix (#15), input validation (#18)
completed_phases.summary: Z.ai agent mode completed all 3 fixes. #13 weight smoothing: normalize first, then clamp with redistribution among unconstrained weights (old approach clamped then normalized, breaking intent). #15 Telegram alerts: added send_message() via Bot API with env var credentials (TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN/CHAT_ID), graceful degradation if unconfigured, dry-run CLI support. #18 input validation: _validate_twse_response() catches HTML/string/dict/list cases at ingestion boundary in fetch_data.py.

completed_phases.name: Polish — unit tests (#22), structured logging (#23)
completed_phases.summary: Z.ai agent mode completed both fixes. #22 unit tests: 475-line test_core.py with pytest covering RSI Wilder smoothing, backward price adjustment, weight smoothing boundary conditions, holiday calendar trading-day counting, and paper trader holding-days calculation. All inline data, no API calls. conftest.py provides shared fixtures. #23 structured logging: new core/logging_config.py with setup_logging(verbose=False, log_file=None, quiet=False), suppresses noisy third-party loggers (urllib3, requests, yfinance). Replaced print() statements in fetch_data, fetch_history, stage1_screen, stage2_deep.

completed_phases.name: Full repo re-review — 12 fixes across core modules
completed_phases.summary: Fresh full review by Z.ai found and fixed 12 issues: stage2 None guards, half-day sessions, corp_handler in volatility calc, adj_close/adj_volume in momentum scoring, TPEx range alignment, stock dividend adjustment, structured logging completion, ROC date deduplication, O(1) index lookups (~6500+ linear scans eliminated), unknown regime safety default (0.0), data validation gates in pipeline orchestrator.

completed_phases.name: SQLite data layer — read-only view on top of existing JSON data files
completed_phases.summary: New core/datastore.py provides SQLite database at data/hunter.db with 4 tables: stocks_daily (OHLCV + adj_close/adj_volume per stock-date), corporate_actions (ex-dividend dates with cash/stock dividends), regime_snapshots (daily regime + TAIEX proxy), portfolio_history (paper trade entries/exits with P&L). Idempotent migrate_json_to_sqlite() reads price_history.json, twt49u_ex_dividend.json, dividends_*.json, regime.json, paper_trades.json and populates DB using INSERT OR IGNORE. Query helpers: get_daily_history(), get_regime_history(), get_portfolio_pnl(), get_corporate_actions(), get_stocks_on_date(), get_available_dates(), get_stock_date_range(), get_daily_history_batch(). JSON files remain write target for backward compat. 44 unit tests covering schema init, migration idempotency, all query helpers, and edge cases (malformed JSON, empty data dir, readonly enforcement). All 80 tests pass (36 existing + 44 new).

completed_phases.name: Advanced backtesting — multi-period validation, sector-adjusted returns, drawdown analysis
completed_phases.summary: Three new methods added to PaperTrader: run_multi_period_backtest() splits backtest into N contiguous periods with consistency scoring; compute_sector_adjusted_returns() computes alpha vs equal-weight sector benchmark proxy; compute_drawdown_analysis() tracks peak-to-trough drawdown with recovery metrics. Refactored _run_backtest_on_files() and _simulate_trade_exit() for reuse. All backward compatible.

completed_phases.name: Signal quality scoring — composite signal strength, confidence intervals, regime-aware thresholds, false-signal detection
completed_phases.summary: Four new functions added to stage1_screen.py (now 1745 lines): compute_signal_strength() returns continuous 0-100 score with conviction grade and alignment metric; compute_signal_confidence() scores data quality per dimension with regime-aware momentum reduction; get_regime_adjusted_thresholds() raises pass/watchlist thresholds for stress/crisis/black_swan regimes (CRISIS: pass=80); detect_false_signals() flags contrarian positions, fading momentum, unconfirmed price action, revenue-price divergence, and ex-dividend gaps. stage2_deep.py updated to consume new fields.

completed_phases.name: Signal quality scoring — composite signal strength metric with confidence intervals, regime-aware thresholds, and false-signal detection
completed_phases.summary: Four new functions added to stage1_screen.py (now 1745 lines): compute_signal_strength() returns continuous 0-100 score with conviction grade and alignment metric; compute_signal_confidence() scores data quality per dimension with regime-aware momentum reduction; get_regime_adjusted_thresholds() raises pass/watchlist thresholds for stress/crisis/black_swan regimes (CRISIS: pass=80); detect_false_signals() flags contrarian positions, fading momentum, unconfirmed price action, revenue-price divergence, and ex-dividend gaps. stage2_deep.py updated to consume new fields.

completed_phases.name: Portfolio rebalancing — position sizing optimization (Kelly-inspired), sector rotation signals, correlation-based risk budgeting
completed_phases.summary: Three new methods added to PaperTrader: optimize_positions() uses Kelly-inspired sizing based on signal strength (Phase 27) with max 3x cap and sector diversification limit (15% per sector); compute_sector_rotation() analyzes rolling window of stage2 data to generate overweight/underweight signals; check_correlation_risk() computes pairwise Pearson correlation between holdings, reduces smaller position by 50% when correlation >0.85, reports effective portfolio beta.

completed_phases.name: Alert system overhaul — deduplication, escalation rules, daily digest mode, smart Taiwan-market formatting
completed_phases.summary: Four new features in telegram_alerts.py (now 897 lines): Alert deduplication with SHA-256 hash and configurable cooldown (4h default); escalation rules with 3 severity tiers (info/warning/critical) routing info to digest, warning immediate, critical always; daily digest mode batching info alerts into morning/evening digests; smart Taiwan-market formatting with Traditional Chinese regime names (常態/警戒/壓力/危機/黑天鵝), TWSE/TPEx board indicators (上市/上櫃), NT$ price conventions.

completed_phases.name: Market microstructure analysis — volume profile (VPVR), gap-fill probability, volume anomaly detection, intraday candlestick pattern recognition
completed_phases.summary: Four new functions across stage1_screen.py (+298 lines) and stage2_deep.py (+378 lines): compute_volume_profile() approximates VPVR with adaptive bin sizes (NT\/5/10); compute_gap_fill_probability() analyzes historical gap patterns with fill rate stats; detect_volume_anomalies() flags institutional interest/low conviction via 20-day rolling median; classify_intraday_pattern() recognizes 9 candlestick types. Microstructure adjustments integrated into Stage 1 composite scoring (capped ±10 points). All use adjusted prices/volumes from Phase 2.

completed_phases.name: News sentiment integration — scrape Taiwan financial news (UDN, CBN), classify sentiment with keyword matching and NLP-lite scoring, integrate sentiment signal into Stage 2 deep analysis
completed_phases.summary: Created core/news_sentiment.py with news fetching from UDN/CBN, Traditional Chinese keyword sentiment classification (19 positive, 20 negative keywords), loss aversion bias (1.3x negative weight), recency weighting (7-day linear decay), and Stage 2 integration via check_news_sentiment(). Sentiment maps to score (+0.5→90, neutral→60, -0.5→30). Cache in data/news_cache.json with 4h TTL. Added news_sentiment:0.11 weight to weights.json (v5.0). Red flag: score<35 disqualifies from Stage 2. Graceful fallback if fetch fails. 39 new tests, 119 total passing.

completed_phases.name: Daily report generation — Markdown/HTML daily reports combining all pipeline outputs
completed_phases.summary: Created core/report_generator.py (1478 lines) with generate_daily_report() producing comprehensive Markdown reports at reports/YYYY-MM-DD.md, and generate_html_report() for styled HTML variants. Features: ROC date format (民國XXXX年XX月XX日), market regime badges in Traditional Chinese (常態/警戒/壓力/危機/黑天鵝), signal grade A-E with emoji coloring (🟢A/B green, 🟡C/D yellow, 🔴E red), screening results tables, deep-dive details for pass candidates, portfolio status (positions/PnL), sector rotation signals with Taiwan market terminology, alert digest. Backward compatible — skips gracefully if upstream data missing. Integrated as Stage 10 in run_pipeline.py after all other stages. Pipeline test: 10/10 stages passed in 39.7s.

completed_phases.name: Comprehensive test suite expansion — 150+ tests for all Phase 26-32 modules
completed_phases.summary: Expanded test suite from ~119 to 318 tests (+199 new). Five test files: test_report_generator.py (57 tests, Phase 32), test_news_sentiment.py (+17 edge cases → 57 total, Phase 31), test_microstructure.py (49 tests, Phase 30), test_rebalancing.py (26 tests, Phase 28), test_alerts.py (49 tests, Phase 29). All inline synthetic data, zero API calls. Taiwan market conventions verified: TWSE codes (2330/2454), Traditional Chinese regime names, lang=zh-TW HTML attributes. Full suite: 318 passed in 7.17s. Pipeline: 10/10 stages in 36.0s.

completed_phases.name: Cross-asset correlation engine — TAIEX futures, USD/TWD, HSI, KWEB, VIX integration
completed_phases.summary: Created core/market_context.py (575 lines) with fetch_cross_assets() pulling TAIEX futures (^TWII), USD/TWD, HSI, KWEB, VIX via yfinance with 6h TTL cache; compute_market_breadth() for advance/decline ratio and cross-asset correlation matrix; get_cross_asset_signal() returning -0.2 to +0.2 adjustment based on VIX risk sentiment, USD/TWD trend, HSI divergence. Integrated into regime_detector.py as optional 6th input (cross-asset override shifts regime one tier when signal >±0.15, BLACK_SWAN protected). Integrated into stage2_deep.py scaling signal to ±3 points in combined_score. All backward compatible with neutral defaults on fetch failure. Pipeline: 10/10 stages passed in 41.0s.

completed_phases.name: Earnings season engine — quarterly earnings reports (季報) integration with YoY/QoQ growth, estimate surprises into Stage 2 scoring
completed_phases.summary: Created core/earnings_analysis.py (810 lines) with fetch_earnings_data(), compute_yoy_growth(), compute_qoq_growth(), check_estimate_surprise(), get_earnings_signal(). Added data/analyst_consensus.json template. Integrated into stage2_deep.py as check_earnings_quality() with weight 0.12 (weights.json v6.0). Red flag: earnings score < 20 disqualifies from Stage 2 pass. Backward compatible — all functions return None/neutral when data unavailable. Taiwan-market aware with Traditional Chinese labels and TWSE quarterly financials endpoint. Pipeline: 10/10 stages passed in 39.1s.

completed_phases.name: Risk management overlay — ATR stops, position limits, VaR estimation
completed_phases.summary: Created core/risk_manager.py (764 lines) with ATR-based stop-loss tiers, trailing stops by conviction grade (A:E = 15%-25%), position limit enforcement (stock ≤8%, sector ≤25%, correlation <0.85), portfolio VaR estimation via historical simulation (60-day lookback), risk summary dashboard (1-10 score). Integrated into paper_trader.py with pre-trade risk gate, ATR stops, and conviction-based sizing. All Traditional Chinese labels, backward compatible.

completed_phases.name: Machine learning signal fusion — ensemble model combining all Phase 26-36 scoring dimensions into unified probability of outperformance
completed_phases.summary: Created core/signal_fusion.py (1272 lines) with SignalNormalization class, compute_ensemble_score() → float [0,1], get_feature_importance() (SHAP-like permutation importance), calibrate_scores() (isotonic regression + Platt scaling), get_confidence_band(). Added config/signal_fusion_weights.json (13 dimensions summing to 1.0 + interaction terms). Integrated as Stage 11 in run_pipeline.py after report_generator. Produces data/ensemble_YYYY-MM-DD.json with per-stock ensemble scores, rankings, and feature importance. All backward compatible with neutral defaults. Taiwan-market aware with Traditional Chinese labels. Pipeline: 11/11 stages passed in 37.2s.

completed_phases.name: Portfolio Optimization Engine — mean-variance / Black-Litterman with Taiwan market constraints
completed_phases.summary: Created core/portfolio_optimizer.py (1333 lines) with 7 public functions: load_ensemble_results() reads Phase 37 output, compute_covariance_matrix() builds empirical covariance with holiday forward-fill, optimize_mean_variance() solves Markowitz with Taiwan constraints (stock ≤8%, sector ≤25%, min 1% position, long-only), optimize_black_litterman() implements BL framework with ensemble-derived views, apply_weight_smoothing() integrates Phase 6 max 5% daily change, validate_constraints() checks Phases 5/36 constraints, run_portfolio_optimizer() is the Stage 12 pipeline entry point. Uses scipy.optimize when available, falls back to iterative heuristic optimizer. Produces data/optimized_portfolio_YYYY-MM-DD.json with stock_weights, sector_allocation, annualized return/volatility/Sharpe, constraint_violations, smoothing_applied. Integrated as Stage 12 in run_pipeline.py after signal_fusion. 73 comprehensive tests, all passing. All Traditional Chinese labels, backward compatible with graceful skips.

completed_phases.name: Performance Dashboard UI — modern dark-theme dashboard for tracking screening & portfolio performance visually
completed_phases.summary: Single-page dark-theme dashboard with Chart.js 4.x, Tailwind CSS CDN, Lucide Icons. 6 files (~3057 lines) covering KPI cards, candidates table (sortable/expandable), portfolio allocation donut/bar, P&L chart, VaR gauge, signal fusion radar (13 dimensions), regime history, cross-asset monitor, pipeline timeline. Data loaded client-side from JSON files with graceful degradation for missing data. Traditional Chinese labels throughout. 3 bugs fixed post-review: state.json path (repo root not data/), label_zh optimization method display, paper_trades empty handling.

notes: Phase 39 complete. Dashboard UI implemented and verified.

findings: Ex-date price should not be adjusted (already post-dividend)
Regime label mismatch: bull vs normal, stale 5-day holdover
Stage 2 zero candidates due to missing dividends/major_sh data loads
fixes_applied: Corporate action backward adjustment engine fixed (/10 divisor)
Two-pass approach for ex-date factor calc (day-before close)
Regime migration fix: old names force immediate transition
Added dividends + major_sh to load_data() optional datasets

items_addressed: Score quantization → continuous scoring (was only 2 unique div scores)
Stage 1 threshold tuning: market_cap NT\$50B→NT\$30B, adv NT\$100M→NT\$50M
Regime cross-check against TAIEX drawdown (verified crisis label)
Volume adjustment already applied from R4
